extra.note: Both sp.causal_forest.average_treatment_effect and grf::average_treatment_effect report the AIPW doubly-robust ATE/ATT. On this clean-overlap DGP the StatsPAI row uses clip=0.25, consistent with the known e(X) support [0.30,0.70], and agrees with grf within combined Monte Carlo error (worst rel gap below 0.3%). A multi-seed clean-overlap pytest guard checks AIPW truth recovery for both ATE and ATT. The former NSW-DW stress case is now tracked in the Track B robustness sweep.
